creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Aug 3, 2009 at 11:51, <miwi@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: polish/kadu: fix build
>

From what I can see, the only change is addition of "script" to list
of Qt components.
It is however not needed according to build instructions of kadu and I have just
successfully built it after deinstalling qt4-script.

Please show your error log.

>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=137380
>
